zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean d'Alençon I於大約1121年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆時，他的父親Guillaume III Talvas35歲，母親Hélène de Bourgogne42歲。他和Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1191年2月24日在法國諾門迪奧內阿倫c享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean d'Alençon I was born about 1121, in Somme, Picardie, France, his father, Guillaume III Talvas, was 35 and his mother, Hélène de Bourgogne, was 42. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine. He died on 24 February 1191, in Alençon, Orne, Normandy, France, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean d'Alençon I est né environ 1121, à Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Guillaume III Talvas, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Hélène de Bourgogne, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine. Il est décédé le 24 février 1191, à Alençon, Orne, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de: Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Jean d'Alençon I um 1121 in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume III Talvas 35 und seine Mutter Hélène de Bourgogne 42. Er hatte mit Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Februar 1191 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Alençon, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean d'Alençon I è nato il circa 1121 nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume III Talvas, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Hélène de Bourgogne, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine. Morì il 24 febbraio 1191, nel Alençon, Orne, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean d'Alençon Iが約1121年にフランスピカーディソンメで生まれた時，父Guillaume III Talvasは35歳，母Hélène de Bourgogneは42歳であった。彼はBeatrice d'Anjou du Maineとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1191年2月24日にフランスノーマンディオルンアレンcオンで71歳で死去した。

ko.Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 니우프cha텔--사스노이스
ko.lifeSummary: Jean d'Alençon I(이)가 대략 1121년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume III Talvas(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Hélène de Bourgogne(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1191년 2월 24일 프랑스 노먼디 른 알렌c에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean d'Alençon I nasceu aproximadamente 1121, em Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Guillaume III Talvas, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Hélène de Bourgogne, tinha 42 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine. Ele faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1191, em Alençon, Orne, Normandie, França, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean d'Alençon I родился около 1121 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume III Talvas было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Hélène de Bourgogne, 42. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine. Он умер 24 февраля 1191 г. в местности аленcон, орн, норманди, Франция в возрасте 71 год.
